The Coit Tower is located on Telegraph Hill in northeast San Francisco. From its top, you can enjoy a magnificent all-round view on beautiful and clear days, including Golden Gate Bridge, Alcatraz, Fisherman's Wharf and the city skyline. Otherwise, there is not much more to see on the mountain than residential houses.

I like to take visiting friends here because the views are great, the interior of Coit Tower is unique, and the walk down the Filbert Steps is very special indeed.  A distinct neighborhood of the city.
Telegraph Hill is a really nice area of San Francisco. It leads up to Coit Tower. The views from the hill are wonderful. Lots of steps!
